visual: Picture Graphs (Mode 1: Reading). Same "Animals at the Zoo" graph (vertical, 4 categories). Data Table visible.
guide: You're reading picture graphs like a pro. Now let's see another way to show data: bar graphs.
visual_transition: Picture graph transforms/animates into bar graph with vertical axis and tick marks at 0 to 8 showing same data. Animation either transforms the picture graph to a bar graph OR (a) bar graph appears alongside picture graph
guide_2: Same information, different format. Instead of counting symbols, we read where the bar ends.
implementation_note: Visual transition can be side-by-side display OR transformation animation—either achieves the pedagogical goal of connecting the two formats.
